Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. Remove all modern
businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing street-facing, fov 80
- main street road, 2-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: alley entrance mid-block; parking: parallel street parking both sides
- two-story brick commercial building at left block face, 2 stories, red brick, cast iron storefront columns, flat parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- single-story retail building at center block face, 1 story, brick, plate glass storefront, flat with low parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- corner mixed-use building at right corner, 3 stories, brick, stone trim cornice, flat roof, at sidewalk setback
- utilities: overhead power and telephone lines, wooden utility poles every 50 feet
- landscape: concrete sidewalks, brick pavers at crosswalks, small planted tree pits
- immutable elements: cast iron storefront columns on left building, recessed corner entrance on right building, brick alley mid-block
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 1995
Clinton era prosperity. A 1995 main street — the video rental store at its absolute peak, a computer shop newly arrived, chain logos displacing the last hand-painted signs.

PERIOD DETAILS
- pizza and sub shop with a '2 SLICES + SODA $2.99' sign in the window
- the same local diner, sign aging, 'HOT COFFEE 75¢' in the window
- barber shop with its spinning barber pole, unchanged
Typography: clean geometric sans-serif, early digital influence.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 10 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a mother pushing a stroller past the diner
- a man walking a dog past the computer shop
Clothing: men in backwards caps, windbreakers; women in slip dresses, high-waisted mom jeans. Fashion palette: forest green, maroon, mustard yellow. No posing or eye contact.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 5 period vehicles, all different:
- 1991-1996 Ford Escort — small rounded economy car — white
- 1993-1998 Jeep Grand Cherokee — early SUV, boxy-rounded — navy blue
- 1993-1997 Ford Ranger — compact pickup, straight lines — teal
- 1992-1996 Ford F-150 — rounded aero body — black
- 1992-1995 Honda Civic — small rounded coupe and sedan — silver
Parked with gaps; optionally 1 driving; no vehicle newer than 1995.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, turn lane arrows
- utilities: overhead power lines standard, cable TV and early phone data lines on poles

TREES
- oak tree at sidewalk left near corner: established tree, modest canopy
- maple tree at sidewalk center in front of retail: very young sapling

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — Kodak Gold 200 or Fujifilm Superia 200 look.
Color: neutral to slightly warm tones. Grain: fine grain, cleaner than 1985.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 1991-1996 Ford Escort — small rounded economy car
1993-1998 Jeep Grand Cherokee — early SUV, boxy-rounded
1993-1997 Ford Ranger — compact pickup, straight lines
1992-1995 Honda Civic — small rounded coupe and sedan
